creator: rodrigosloop@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 243479
bounds, info.4 and core.txt.4 files

Hi,

I've been experiencing some crashes since I updated from 13.1-RELEASE to 13.2-RELEASE while using xfwm4 on x11 and wayfire and hikari on wayland.

Also important to mention that I upgraded the BIOS, which changed the PCI bus id of the graphics card from 34:0:0 to 41:0:0, although I'm not aware of any other changes in behavior or register mappings.

I attach the crash report of the offending event. The entire crash report along with the kernel core dump can be downloaded from http://antares-labs.eu/isometric/fbsd-13.2-release.crashdumps.txz

If you need anything else, please let me know.
